description: Style NotePlush upper with easy-peasy slip on styling, this classic loungewear pair is great if you're colour blocking or matching with your ensemble. Wear this sockless with rolled up denims for a fun vacay or a weekend getaway!Product DetailsBlue nubuck upper with slip-on styling and stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxMidfoot strap with a cut outSoft footbed, upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with nubs all over the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
